query: SELECT dp.forDate, dp.dayType, dp.status, COUNT(b.id) AS blocks, SUM(CASE WHEN b.curriculumTopicId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withTopic FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN blocks b ON b.dailyPlanId = dp.id WHERE dp.forDate BETWEEN '2026-05-27' AND '2026-06-10' GROUP BY dp.id, dp.forDate, dp.dayType, dp.status ORDER BY dp.forDate;
